title: Lead Frontend Developer at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions!
